ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient diagnosed with the condition */,
  "ner_chunk" TEXT /* NLP-derived chunk for the condition */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., PROBLEM) */,
  "icd10_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare provider who diagnosed the condition */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the condition record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition */,
  "icd10_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the condition */,
  "all_codes" TEXT /* All associated codes in JSON format */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the ICD-10 code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the code record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the code record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_codes_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition */,
  "resolutions" TEXT /* Resolutions related to the condition in JSON format */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the resolution was determined */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare provider who determined the resolution */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the resolution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the resolution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the resolution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_info" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition */,
  "billable" TEXT /* Billing status as JSON */,
  "hcc_status" TEXT /* HCC status as JSON */,
  "hcc_code" TEXT /* HCC codes as JSON */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date when the billing information was recorded */,
  "billed_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the staff member who recorded the billing information */,
  "billing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the billing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the billing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the billing record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_info_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for each user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, doctor, nurse) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition being treated */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the treatment */,
  "treatment_provider" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare provider who administered the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the treatment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the appointment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who created the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the appointment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the appointment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the insurance */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Coverage details in JSON format */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the insurance policy became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the insurance policy expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the insurance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the insurance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Admission date to the hospital */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Discharge date from the hospital */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for hospitalization */,
  "discharge_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the discharge */,
  "hospitalization_provider" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare provider who managed the hospitalization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hospitalization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hospitalization record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the medication record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
